steps.description: Press the "F1" key to open the command palette in the Visual Studio Code workspace interface.
Type text: 'Open settings (UI)' into the command palette search bar in Visual Studio Code.
Press the "Enter" key to select the highlighted command "Preferences: Open Settings (UI)" in the Visual Studio Code command palette.

parameters.text: enable launch agent for teams in copilot

steps.description: Type text 'enable launch agent for teams in copilot' into the "Search settings" input field within the VS Code "Settings" interface, under the "User" tab in the "Commonly Used" section.
Perform a right-click on the "Settings" tab in the Visual Studio Code interface, located at the top center of the application.
Click the "Close" option in the context menu of the VS Code tab bar to close the active tab.
